title: prunus × budae
intro: Prunus × budae, a hybrid plant of Prunus mume and Prunus incisa, is also known as the Korean apricot or budae plum, native to East Asia. The medicinal properties of Prunus × budae include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. This plant is known for its health benefits, such as improving digestion, reducing symptoms of fever, and acting as an antioxidant. Prunus × budae is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, to leverage its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
